prompt: create a neon-soaked mixing-board interface, chunky sliders glowing magenta and teal, vector grid horizon in the background, cassette-style VU meters bouncing to an 80s beat
prompt_refined: Generate a retrowave-style image of a futuristic, neon-soaked mixing-board interface. The foreground prominently features chunky control sliders, illuminated with a vibrant glow of magenta and teal. In the background, a sharp, receding vector grid horizon defines the scene. Integrated into the interface are retro cassette-style VU meters, visually indicating dynamic activity as if pulsating to an 80s synth beat.
objects: sharp, receding vector grid horizon (in the background)
retro cassette-style VU meters (integrated into the interface)
